images.prompt: a beautiful smile in darkness, teeth glinting like knives
gold-filled cracks spreading through black porcelain, kintsugi under neon
a rotten apple with a single gold bite mark on a silver platter
a bare black tree dropping golden fruit into shadow
a long dinner table set for many, every seat empty, candles burning low
a white silk glove with a spreading dark stain, dramatic light
a red-lipped smile reflected in a cracked golden mirror
two hands clasped in golden light amid surrounding darkness
a porcelain masquerade mask cracking, gold light leaking through
a figure dissolving into gold dust under a violet spotlight
